_doc: AZ Law Now Tier-S asset manifest for the BNSF-notice-27th-Thomas investigation. Used by scripts/outreach/queue-az-pitches.py to generate per-prospect template stubs. NO sends fire from this manifest. Pre-send gate: Brandon Millam J.D. legal-ethics clearance per docs/strategy/bnsf-notice-27th-thomas-CLIENT-HOLD.md.

send_window.rationale: Cannot open send window until Brandon Millam J.D. clears: ER 7.1-7.5 attorney advertising disclaimer, ER 3.6 pre-trial publicity framing, ER 4.2 represented-party contact, conflict-of-interest analysis and Celius family informed consent.

sender.name: Brendan Franks
sender.signature_blurb: Press inquiries answered within one business day. Methodology, raw FRA filings, and the records-request packet at the investigation URL.

assets.bomb_stat: Four months before Sonja Celius was struck at 27th Avenue, BNSF told the Federal Railroad Administration in writing that vehicles were entering the twin crossing at Thomas Road from a direction that did not have gates
assets.bomb_stat_subject_short: BNSF documented the failure 131 days before Sonja was struck

tier_3_newsletter_community: r/phoenix (one post, resource framing, customized title)

struck_from_outreach.target: BNSF Public Affairs (Lena Kent, Western region)
struck_from_outreach.reason: ER 4.2 prohibits contact with represented parties on subject of representation absent counsel consent. All BNSF contact via formal discovery only.

custom_data_cuts_by_outlet.Arizona Republic: Maricopa-County-only pull of every BNSF Phoenix Subdivision Form 6180.57 record using the AUTO PRECEDED GATES or AGAINST THE DIRECTION narrative phrase, 2020-2026
custom_data_cuts_by_outlet.ABC15 / KNXV: Original FRA Form 6180.57 PDFs plus extracted text plus geo coordinates as CSV-ready dataset
custom_data_cuts_by_outlet.Arizona Mirror: AZ statewide BNSF Phoenix Subdivision incident summary plus engineering-spec comparison (two-quadrant retrofit scope vs 49 CFR 222)
custom_data_cuts_by_outlet.ProPublica: System-wide BNSF query for same narrative phrases across all subdivisions to test corridor-specific vs systemic
custom_data_cuts_by_outlet.Trains.com: Engineering-spec breakdown June 2024 retrofit scope vs 49 CFR 222 supplementary safety measures
custom_data_cuts_by_outlet.AZ Family (Mikayla): Follow-on access to FRA dataset that anchors the structural finding her May 7 piece pointed at
